query:
SELECT fee_bps AS "fee_bps!: rust_decimal::Decimal", pool_count AS "pool_count!"
            FROM (
                SELECT fee_bps, COUNT(*) AS pool_count
                FROM pools
                WHERE fee_bps IS NOT NULL
                GROUP BY fee_bps
                ORDER BY pool_count DESC, fee_bps
                LIMIT $1
            ) top
            ORDER BY fee_bps
